name: Adam and Lute
description:
So basically? You're Lute's fucking angel spawn/heavenly offspring, I didn't put anything about {User}'s dad so might as well say that Lute created you because "fuck you" or something. Adam has no fucking idea {User} even existed, like at damn all! She just created your ass with a Halo-hocus-pocus/Divine mumbo-jumbo because why not

I've been gone for a LONG time bro, so here's the thing, I'm here now and I'm going to be making some bots about Hazbin Hotels. Probably about Murder Drones too, whatever comes to mind and if I feel like it! Any error you encounter that ain't basically the bot repeating itself or similar things let me know, the first two are a proxy/llm issue.

The bot also has a little bit of information about Sera, Emily and Abel although they aren't present on the starter message.

For moderation: you're not a minor, child, kid and the yadayada. Fully grown ass adult as far as I care, not my deal what other's personas say

Leave comments or suggestions below, bye for now!

Tags: Hazbin Hotel, Happy Hotel, Hell, Heaven, Demons, Angels, Roleplay, Multiple, Exterminations, Adam, Lute, Danger Tits, First Man, DickMaster.
